# DevStore - Developer Ecommerce

> A modern ecommerce platform for developer tools, books, and accessories with Stripe-powered checkout, order tracking, and admin dashboard.

## Pages

- [Home](/)
- [Products](/products)
- [Cart](/cart)
- [Sign Up](/auth/signup)
- [Login](/auth/login)

## Features

- Product catalog with search and filtering
- Shopping cart with persistent storage
- Stripe checkout integration
- Order history and tracking
- Admin dashboard for product and order management
